claim: Barragem do Arade (APA official data) has useful capacity of 26.744 hm³, surface area of 1.82 km² at full storage, minimum exploitation level of 34.5m — when below this level the reservoir is non-functional as a water source for wildlife.
stance_target: Barragem do Arade as conditional permanent water source in territorial layer — with minimum functional threshold
scope_conditions: Barragem do Arade, Silves; APA official registry data
quoted_support: Capacidade útil - 26744 x 1000m3 / Nível de pleno armazenamento (NPA) - 61 m / Nível mínimo de exploração (Nme) - 34,5 m / Área inundada ao NPA - 1820 x 1000m2
entities: Associação de Regantes e Beneficiários de Silves, Lagoa e Portimão
